mapper.select:
SELECT A.CORP_NO || A.DOC_DEPT_C || lvl AS "tree" , A.* FROM ( SELECT LEVEL AS lvl , LPAD('', (level-1)*2, '')||ORG.DEPT_C AS DEPT_C , LPAD('', (level-1)*2, '')||ORG.DEPT_NM AS DEPT_NM , ORG.UP_DEPT_C , (SELECT A.BRC FROM TB_CO_BRC A WHERE A.CORP_NO = REPLACE(ORG.CORP_NO,'-','') AND A.BRC = DECODE(ORG.NH_CORP_CODE,'2',ORG.DEPT_C,ORG.ONL_C)) AS BRC , (SELECT A.BRNM FROM TB_CO_BRC A WHERE A.CORP_NO = REPLACE(ORG.CORP_NO,'-','') AND A.BRC = DECODE(ORG.NH_CORP_CODE,'2',ORG.DEPT_C,ORG.ONL_C)) AS BRNM , ORG.NH_CORP_CODE , REPLACE(REPLACE(ORG.CORP_NO,'-',''),' ','') AS CORP_NO , DOC_DEPT_C FROM NHEBILL.TB_CO_ORGZ ORG WHERE ORG.STSC = '1' -- AND CORP_NO='1048207072' AND REPLACE(REPLACE(ORG.CORP_NO,'-',''),' ','') IS NOT NULL AND REPLACE(REPLACE(ORG.ONL_C,'-',''),' ','') IS NOT NULL START WITH ORG.DEPT_C = '0' CONNECT BY ORG.UP_DEPT_C = PRIOR ORG.DEPT_C ) A WHERE 1=1
AND A.DEPT_NM LIKE '%' #{DEPT_NM_LT} '%'

SELECT B.CORP_NM --법인명 , B.CORP_NO --법인번호 , A.DEPT_C --부서코드 , A.DEPT_NM --부서명 , A.BRC --사무소코드 , (SELECT C.BRNM FROM TB_CO_BRC C WHERE C.CORP_NO = A.CORP_NO AND C.BRC = A.BRC) AS BRNM --사무소명 , A.USER_ID --사용자ID , DAMO.DECRYPT_VAR_B64('EBILL_AES_256', A.USER_NM, '') AS USER_NM --사용자명 , A.OFT_NM --직명 , A.PZC_NM --직급 , A.CHRG_BSN_NM --담당업무 , DAMO.DECRYPT_VAR_B64('EBILL_AES_256', A.DWIN_TEL, '') AS DWIN_TEL --내선번호 , DAMO.DECRYPT_VAR_B64('EBILL_AES_256', A.HP_NO, '') AS HP_NO --휴대전화 , DAMO.DECRYPT_VAR_B64('EBILL_AES_256', A.EMAIL, '') AS EMAIL --이메일 FROM TB_CO_USER A , TB_CO_CORP B WHERE 1=1 AND A.CORP_NO = B.CORP_NO
AND A.DEPT_C = #{DEPT_C}
AND (A.DEPT_C = #{DEPT_C} OR A.UP_DEPT_C = #{DEPT_C})
AND A.DEPT_NM LIKE '%' #{DEPT_NM} '%'
AND DAMO.DECRYPT_VAR_B64('EBILL_AES_256', A.USER_NM, '') LIKE '%' #{USER_NM} '%'
AND A.USER_ID LIKE '%' #{USER_ID} '%'
AND A.EMP_STSC = '1' ORDER BY A.PZC_C ASC
